nasb.text: And David said to Abishai, “Now Sheba the son of Bichri will do us more harm than Absalom; take your lord’s servants and pursue him, so that he does not find for himself fortified cities and escape from our sight.”

esv.text: And David said to Abishai, “Now Sheba the son of Bichri will do us more harm than Absalom. Take your lord’s servants and pursue him, lest he get himself to fortified cities and escape from us.”

cnv.text: 大衛對亞比篩說：“現在比基利的兒子示巴要加害我們，比押沙龍更甚。你要帶著你主人的僕人去追趕他，免得他找到了設防的城鎮，就避過我們的眼目，從我們的手中逃脫了。”

ccb.text: 大卫对亚比筛说：“现在比基利的儿子示巴对我们带来的危害恐怕比押沙龙还要大。你带领我的部下去捉拿他，免得他占据了坚固的城池，得以逃脱。”
